mapper.select: SELECT id, admission_id, record_date, condition_description, treatment_summary, treatment_fee, created_at FROM inpatient_records WHERE admission_id = #{admissionId} ORDER BY record_date DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inpatient_records (admission_id, record_date, condition_description, treatment_summary, treatment_fee, created_at) VALUES (#{admissionId}, #{recordDate}, #{conditionDescription}, #{treatmentSummary}, #{treatmentFee}, NOW())
